title: sloanea australis subsp. australis
intro: Sloanea australis subsp. australis is a plant species belonging to the family Erythroxylaceae, native to New Guinea. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Sloanea australis subsp. australis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and improve immune function. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used in traditional medicine in various parts of its native region.
